mapper.select: select (select count(1) from jst_enroll_record er join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = er.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where er.del_flag = '0' and er.contest_id = #{contestId} and c.partner_id = #{partnerId}) as enrollCount, (select count(1) from jst_score_record s join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = s.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where s.del_flag = '0' and s.contest_id = #{contestId} and c.partner_id = #{partnerId}) as scoredCount, (select count(1) from jst_score_record s join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = s.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where s.del_flag = '0' and s.contest_id = #{contestId} and s.audit_status = 'pending' and c.partner_id = #{partnerId}) as pendingReviewCount, (select count(1) from jst_score_record s join jst_contest c on c.contest_id = s.contest_id and c.del_flag = '0' where s.del_flag = '0' and s.contest_id = #{contestId} and s.publish_status = 'published' and c.partner_id = #{partnerId}) as publishedCount

select score_id, contest_id, enroll_id, user_id, participant_id, score_value, award_level, rank_no, import_batch_no, audit_status, publish_status, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from jst_score_record where score_id = #{scoreId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1

select enroll_id as enrollId, enroll_no as enrollNo, contest_id as contestId, user_id as userId, participant_id as participantId, audit_status as auditStatus from jst_enroll_record where contest_id = #{contestId} and enroll_id = #{enrollId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.update: update jst_score_record set contest_id = #{score.contestId}, enroll_id = #{score.enrollId}, user_id = #{score.userId}, participant_id = #{score.participantId}, score_value = #{score.scoreValue}, award_level = #{score.awardLevel}, rank_no = #{score.rankNo}, remark = #{score.remark}, update_by = #{score.updateBy}, update_time = #{score.updateTime} where score_id = #{score.scoreId} and audit_status = #{expectedAuditStatus} and publish_status = 'unpublished' and del_flag = '0'
update jst_score_record set remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where score_id = #{scoreId} and publish_status = 'published' and del_flag = '0'
